puzzle0.title: OCCUPANT IDENTITY CORRELATION
puzzle0.description: Match each recovered pod record with the correct identity conclusion.

event0.text: Because dead men don't develop a pulse just because we open a door.

event1.text: And before Maya says it, yes, I hear how that sounds coming from me.

event0.title: POD OCCUPANT SCAN
event0.content:
Visual Feed: unavailable
Cryostasis Interior: occupied
Face Recognition: failed
Suit Identifier: NV-08
Archive Match: Noah Voss
Biometric State: active
Signal Distortion: severe
event0.caption: Pod occupant scan reconstructed without image feed.
event0.message: [POD OCCUPANT SCAN ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event0.title: CRYOSTASIS LOCK WARNING
event0.content:
LOCK STATE: active
Subject: NOAH VOSS
Instruction: DO NOT WAKE
Requested By: Ethan Hale
Override Status: available
Warning: manual override may trigger neural shock
event0.caption: Cryostasis warning recovered from pod control layer.
event0.message: [CRYOSTASIS LOCK WARNING ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event2.title: OCCUPANT MEDICAL SCAN
event2.content:
NAME: NOAH VOSS
STATUS: ALIVE
HEARTBEAT: DETECTED
NEURAL ACTIVITY: LOW BUT PRESENT
CRYOSTASIS STATE: UNSTABLE
WAKE RISK: HIGH
PRESERVATION RISK: RISING
event2.caption: Medical scan recovered from emergency pod system.
event2.message: [OCCUPANT MEDICAL SCAN ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event1.text: No. Suit says NV-08. Medical says alive. Lock says do not wake. Keep them separate.

event2.text: No. Noah Voss was not on the manifest. He was not even supposed to exist.

backgroundEvent2.text: Do not touch the cryostasis controls.

event0.text: I can't explain it. That's the problem.

event1.text: A missing man. A forbidden file. A pod that shouldn't have anyone inside.

event2.text: If this is a rescue, it feels like someone arranged it years ago.

event1.text: You wake someone too fast, you can save their body and destroy everything that makes them a person.

event2.text: And that is the generous version of what could happen.

event3.text: Wake Risk: high. Preservation Risk: rising.

event0.text: Then don't let him near the black box.
Then we are already too late.

event2.title: CRYOSTASIS LOG
event2.content:
EMERGENCY LOCK ENABLED
REQUESTED BY: ETHAN HALE
SUBJECT: NOAH VOSS
STATUS: DO NOT WAKE
SECONDARY NOTE: BLACK BOX RECORDER LINKED TO SUBJECT POD
event2.caption: Cryostasis lock record recovered from emergency pod.

event3.title: BLACK BOX RECORDER
event3.content:
CORRUPTED

RECOVERY POSSIBLE

DECRYPTION MODULE REQUIRED.

Linked Subject: NOAH VOSS
Linked Event: INCIDENT ALPHA
Warning: access may expose suppressed command audio.
event3.caption: Recovered black box recorder connected to Incident Alpha.
event3.message: [BLACK BOX RECORDER ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event4.text: YOU WERE NEVER SUPPOSED TO FIND NOAH
